extraction.one_line_summary: AYUSO Juan attacked solo on the Albula Pass descent, built a 1-minute gap to GC group, and vaulted from 1:18 down to 18 seconds behind on GC.
tactical_patterns: SCARONI Felix attacked early on Albula to force time gaps on faster TT riders EVENEPOEL/SKJELMOSE before Sunday ITT.
AYUSO descended at frightening speeds after cresting Albula solo, extending 40-second summit advantage to nearly 1-minute by finish.
SKJELMOSE closed gap to SCARONI group on descent while EVENEPOEL lost contact, revealing descending weakness despite TT strength.

rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: 20-year-old showing Grand Tour winner capability by soloing to victory and gaining 1-minute on GC group
rider_signals.SCARONI Felix: neutral: initiated key GC split but lost yellow to SKJELMOSE due to bonus seconds despite controlling race
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: lost contact with lead GC group on descent again, losing time before crucial Sunday ITT
rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: descended aggressively to close gap and take bonus seconds, reclaiming yellow through tactical awareness
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: stayed with lead GC group when EVENEPOEL dropped, gained time on faster ITT rival
